name: Kinetic Text (Standalone)
description: Standalone text-only showcase of `create_kinetic_text` styles — no audio binding (use `kinetic_text_audio_reactive` for that). A Text TOP feeds a Transform TOP (scale pulse) → Level TOP (opacity fade) → Null TOP, with an LFO CHOP wired in as the animation driver. After import, set the Transform TOP's `sx`/`sy` to expression `1 + 0.2 * op('anim_lfo')['chan1']` and the Level TOP's `opacity` to `0.7 + 0.3 * op('anim_lfo')['chan1']` to enable the breathing pulse (manual-wire — RecipeSchema parameters take constants only, no expressions). Offline-validated against RecipeSchema; UNVERIFIED pending live cook-check.

nodes.name: anim_lfo
nodes.comment: Free-running sine LFO driving the breathing pulse (referenced from manual sx/sy/opacity expressions)

nodes.name: scale
nodes.comment: Breathing scale — wire sx/sy to (1 + 0.2 * op('anim_lfo')['chan1']) manually after import

nodes.name: level
nodes.comment: Opacity fade — wire opacity to (0.7 + 0.3 * op('anim_lfo')['chan1']) manually after import

preview_description: The word 'TDMCP', large, white and centered, breathing in and out with a soft scale-and-fade pulse on a transparent frame — text-only kinetic showcase.
